item.title: Data Recovery for Pen Drive [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Data Recovery for Pen Drive [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Data Recovery for Pen Drive
(Utilities)
Losing of files from different mass storage drives will also result into time and effort loss. Therefore it is necessary to choose perfect recovery plan before any incident occurs. In this reference Data Recovery for Pen Drive software plays a very important role in order to rescue your important data from corrupted or formatted USB flash drives. Software works in all major data loss situations even “drive not formatted” error message visible on computer screen.

[read more]
item.description:
Data Recovery for Pen Drive
(Utilities)
Losing of files from different mass storage drives will also result into time and effort loss. Therefore it is necessary to choose perfect recovery plan before any incident occurs. In this reference Data Recovery for Pen Drive software plays a very important role in order to rescue your important data from corrupted or formatted USB flash drives. Software works in all major data loss situations even “drive not formatted” error message visible on computer screen.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Data Recovery for Pen Drive
(Utilities)
Losing of files from different mass storage drives will also result into time and effort loss. Therefore it is necessary to choose perfect recovery plan before any incident occurs. In this reference Data Recovery for Pen Drive software plays a very important role in order to rescue your important data from corrupted or formatted USB flash drives. Software works in all major data loss situations even “drive not formatted” error message visible on computer screen.

[read more]

item.title: iPod Files Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: iPod Files Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restorefiles
item.itunes:summary:
iPod Files Recovery Software
(Utilities)
iPod file repair surely be the best suited utility for almost every instances of iPod data loss by restoring your valuable file and folders containing audio, snapshots, digital images etc into user defined location. Freeware iPod data salvage utility gets back all missing files from any corrupted iPod due to virus infection, software malfunctions, power surge or any human errors etc. iPod media files restoration software is also able to get back all missing data which were deleted using (shift+delete) command or cleared from recycle bin. iPod music files repair utility can save all recoverable information into log files for future use. iPod folders recovery tool support to all file formats, so it can easily manage recovery of any format which can be saved in iPods. Software offers you preview of all recoverable data before actual repair process starts. iPod file salvage tool supports all major brands of any variety of iPod like apple, iPod shuffle, iPod nano, iPod mini, Samsung, Toshiba, Sony, iPod first generation and iPod next generation. IPod repair specialist utility can easily be installed on any windows operating system such as windows11, windows10, windows8, windows7. Features:*iPod repair service tool reliably restores your valuable data which were lost in any case of accidental deletion.*iPod file rescue software supports all leading iPod manufacturers of any configuration.*Utility can save all recovered information into user defined location.*Tool maintains the originality of recovered data.

[read more]

iPod Files Recovery Software
(Utilities)
iPod file repair surely be the best suited utility for almost every instances of iPod data loss by restoring your valuable file and folders containing audio, snapshots, digital images etc into user defined location. Freeware iPod data salvage utility gets back all missing files from any corrupted iPod due to virus infection, software malfunctions, power surge or any human errors etc. iPod media files restoration software is also able to get back all missing data which were deleted using (shift+delete) command or cleared from recycle bin. iPod music files repair utility can save all recoverable information into log files for future use. iPod folders recovery tool support to all file formats, so it can easily manage recovery of any format which can be saved in iPods. Software offers you preview of all recoverable data before actual repair process starts. iPod file salvage tool supports all major brands of any variety of iPod like apple, iPod shuffle, iPod nano, iPod mini, Samsung, Toshiba, Sony, iPod first generation and iPod next generation. IPod repair specialist utility can easily be installed on any windows operating system such as windows11, windows10, windows8, windows7. Features:*iPod repair service tool reliably restores your valuable data which were lost in any case of accidental deletion.*iPod file rescue software supports all leading iPod manufacturers of any configuration.*Utility can save all recovered information into user defined location.*Tool maintains the originality of recovered data.

[read more]

iPod Files Recovery Software
(Utilities)
iPod file repair surely be the best suited utility for almost every instances of iPod data loss by restoring your valuable file and folders containing audio, snapshots, digital images etc into user defined location. Freeware iPod data salvage utility gets back all missing files from any corrupted iPod due to virus infection, software malfunctions, power surge or any human errors etc. iPod media files restoration software is also able to get back all missing data which were deleted using (shift+delete) command or cleared from recycle bin. iPod music files repair utility can save all recoverable information into log files for future use. iPod folders recovery tool support to all file formats, so it can easily manage recovery of any format which can be saved in iPods. Software offers you preview of all recoverable data before actual repair process starts. iPod file salvage tool supports all major brands of any variety of iPod like apple, iPod shuffle, iPod nano, iPod mini, Samsung, Toshiba, Sony, iPod first generation and iPod next generation. IPod repair specialist utility can easily be installed on any windows operating system such as windows11, windows10, windows8, windows7. Features:*iPod repair service tool reliably restores your valuable data which were lost in any case of accidental deletion.*iPod file rescue software supports all leading iPod manufacturers of any configuration.*Utility can save all recovered information into user defined location.*Tool maintains the originality of recovered data.

item.title: Samsung Music [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Samsung Music [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: ayrahikari
item.itunes:summary:
Samsung Music
(Audioplayers)
Samsung Music Port for Non-Samsung ROM.
What difference between Spotify and Melon version?
- Spotify version has Spotify tab, it commonly used for global region Samsung devices
- Melon version has Melon in bottom tab, used for Korean devices
- Melon version has some UI changes, like search button will be in bottom tab instead of search button
- Both are same, but you need install one of mentioned apps (Spotify or Melon from playstore) to use their services
[read more]
item.description:
Samsung Music
(Audioplayers)
Samsung Music Port for Non-Samsung ROM.
What difference between Spotify and Melon version?
- Spotify version has Spotify tab, it commonly used for global region Samsung devices
- Melon version has Melon in bottom tab, used for Korean devices
- Melon version has some UI changes, like search button will be in bottom tab instead of search button
- Both are same, but you need install one of mentioned apps (Spotify or Melon from playstore) to use their services
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Samsung Music
(Audioplayers)
Samsung Music Port for Non-Samsung ROM.
What difference between Spotify and Melon version?
- Spotify version has Spotify tab, it commonly used for global region Samsung devices
- Melon version has Melon in bottom tab, used for Korean devices
- Melon version has some UI changes, like search button will be in bottom tab instead of search button
- Both are same, but you need install one of mentioned apps (Spotify or Melon from playstore) to use their services

item.title: Data Recovery for NTFS [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Data Recovery for NTFS [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Data Recovery for NTFS
(Utilities)
Company recommends you to download Data Recovery for NTFS that consists of advance scanning techniques helps to retrieve entire damaged files and folders including pictures, images, videos, audio clips from any kind of hard disk media storage. Data repair program also facilitate to generate preview of lost files and folders before actual restoration of data starts. Windows file retrieval application performs read only operations for complete salvage of deleted directories.

[read more]

Windows file retrieval application performs read only operations for complete salvage of deleted directories.

Data repair program also facilitate to generate preview of lost files and folders before actual restoration of data starts. Windows file retrieval application performs read only operations for complete salvage of deleted directories.

item.title: Flash Drive Data Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Flash Drive Data Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecovery-1
item.itunes:summary:
Flash Drive Data Restore
(Utilities)
Want to know about Flash Drive Data Restore software! Cost effective data retrieval application is specifically designed to get back squashed digital media files due to abrupt data deletion conditions such as software failure, virus attack, human error, improper device handling, power surges and such other logical reasons. Data revival software helps to get back deleted files from major USB flash drives even after performing disk formation.

[read more]
item.description:
Flash Drive Data Restore

Want to know about Flash Drive Data Restore software! Cost effective data retrieval application is specifically designed to get back squashed digital media files due to abrupt data deletion conditions such as software failure, virus attack, human error, improper device handling, power surges and such other logical reasons. Data revival software helps to get back deleted files from major USB flash drives even after performing disk formation.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Flash Drive Data Restore
(Utilities)
Want to know about Flash Drive Data Restore software! Cost effective data retrieval application is specifically designed to get back squashed digital media files due to abrupt data deletion conditions such as software failure, virus attack, human error, improper device handling, power surges and such other logical reasons. Data revival software helps to get back deleted files from major USB flash drives even after performing disk formation.

[read more]

item.title: FAT Partition files Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: FAT Partition files Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restorefiles
item.itunes:summary:
FAT Partition files Recovery Tool
(Utilities)
FAT partition files retrieval software helps you to retrieve program files deleted due to software or hardware malfunction, power failure, human error, virus attack, improper device handling, das boot record corruption and unexpected shutdown etc. Windows FAT data recovery tool is read only and non destructive program to recover your accidentally deleted records, formatted data from FAT12, FAT16, FAT32 and VFAT file system based hard disk partition. Application supports recovery of inaccessible documents like audio, video music, games, pictures, graphics, movies, images, office records of format including xls, doc, bmp, html, gif, jpg, jpeg, wma, aac, mid, midi, avi, pdf, ppt, txt, mp3 and mp4. FAT partition files salvage utility is very helpful tool to rescue all deleted data from corrupted master boot record and root directory. FAT data recovery program efficiently works with all windows operating system including windows 11, windows10, windows8, windows7. Software easily recovers lost, erased information, text documents like MS word, MS power point, MS access, MS excel from your hard drives. FAT partition files retrieval tool has GUI wizard and can be operated by both technical, non technical users.Features:* FAT data backup tool can easily restores erased digital pictures, audio, video files, images, music collection and photos from corrupted windows hard disk partition.* FAT partition files recovery tool recovers encrypted data, directories from bad affected master boot record, master file table and root directory.* FAT data salvage program is available with install/uninstall features and quickly retrieves logical, physical drive information.* Application safely and securely recovers data if “driver not detected” on desktop/laptop computer.* FAT file salvage utility is very simple and cost effective, supports all branded hard disk drives including HP, Samsung, Sony, Toshiba and Intel etc.

[read more]
item.description:
FAT Partition files Recovery Tool
(Utilities)
FAT partition files retrieval software helps you to retrieve program files deleted due to software or hardware malfunction, power failure, human error, virus attack, improper device handling, das boot record corruption and unexpected shutdown etc. Windows FAT data recovery tool is read only and non destructive program to recover your accidentally deleted records, formatted data from FAT12, FAT16, FAT32 and VFAT file system based hard disk partition. Application supports recovery of inaccessible documents like audio, video music, games, pictures, graphics, movies, images, office records of format including xls, doc, bmp, html, gif, jpg, jpeg, wma, aac, mid, midi, avi, pdf, ppt, txt, mp3 and mp4. FAT partition files salvage utility is very helpful tool to rescue all deleted data from corrupted master boot record and root directory. FAT data recovery program efficiently works with all windows operating system including windows 11, windows10, windows8, windows7. Software easily recovers lost, erased information, text documents like MS word, MS power point, MS access, MS excel from your hard drives. FAT partition files retrieval tool has GUI wizard and can be operated by both technical, non technical users.Features:* FAT data backup tool can easily restores erased digital pictures, audio, video files, images, music collection and photos from corrupted windows hard disk partition.* FAT partition files recovery tool recovers encrypted data, directories from bad affected master boot record, master file table and root directory.* FAT data salvage program is available with install/uninstall features and quickly retrieves logical, physical drive information.* Application safely and securely recovers data if “driver not detected” on desktop/laptop computer.* FAT file salvage utility is very simple and cost effective, supports all branded hard disk drives including HP, Samsung, Sony, Toshiba and Intel etc.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
FAT Partition files Recovery Tool
(Utilities)
FAT partition files retrieval software helps you to retrieve program files deleted due to software or hardware malfunction, power failure, human error, virus attack, improper device handling, das boot record corruption and unexpected shutdown etc. Windows FAT data recovery tool is read only and non destructive program to recover your accidentally deleted records, formatted data from FAT12, FAT16, FAT32 and VFAT file system based hard disk partition. Application supports recovery of inaccessible documents like audio, video music, games, pictures, graphics, movies, images, office records of format including xls, doc, bmp, html, gif, jpg, jpeg, wma, aac, mid, midi, avi, pdf, ppt, txt, mp3 and mp4. FAT partition files salvage utility is very helpful tool to rescue all deleted data from corrupted master boot record and root directory. FAT data recovery program efficiently works with all windows operating system including windows 11, windows10, windows8, windows7. Software easily recovers lost, erased information, text documents like MS word, MS power point, MS access, MS excel from your hard drives. FAT partition files retrieval tool has GUI wizard and can be operated by both technical, non technical users.Features:* FAT data backup tool can easily restores erased digital pictures, audio, video files, images, music collection and photos from corrupted windows hard disk partition.* FAT partition files recovery tool recovers encrypted data, directories from bad affected master boot record, master file table and root directory.* FAT data salvage program is available with install/uninstall features and quickly retrieves logical, physical drive information.* Application safely and securely recovers data if “driver not detected” on desktop/laptop computer.* FAT file salvage utility is very simple and cost effective, supports all branded hard disk drives including HP, Samsung, Sony, Toshiba and Intel etc.

item.title: Cell Phone SIM Card Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Cell Phone SIM Card Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecovery-1
item.itunes:summary:
Cell Phone SIM Card Recovery
(Utilities)
Compatible Cell Phone SIM Card Recovery program empowers user to retrieve deleted contact numbers, text messages, recently dialed numbers and other card information from mobile sim card memory in simplified way. Website www.flashdrivedatarecovery.net provides facility to restore accidently erased valuable contact numbers, text messages etc from cell phone SIM card memory in few simple steps.

[read more]

[read more]

Website www.flashdrivedatarecovery.net provides facility to restore accidently erased valuable contact numbers, text messages etc from cell phone SIM card memory in few simple steps.
